seoTitle: Upper Glastonbury vs Upper Kandanga — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Upper Glastonbury and Upper Kandanga. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Upper Glastonbury vs Upper Kandanga: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Upper Glastonbury and Upper Kandanga.
heading: Upper Glastonbury vs Upper Kandanga — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Upper Glastonbury, Queensland and Upper Kandanga, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Upper Glastonbury has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Upper Kandanga (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Upper Glastonbury or Upper Kandanga safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Upper Glastonbury has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Upper Kandanga scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Upper Glastonbury scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Upper Kandanga scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Upper Glastonbury or Upper Kandanga?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Upper Glastonbury has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
